caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall behind him. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone is positioned in front of him, mounted on a boom arm that bears the text "Rode Podcast Studio". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. In the beginning, he makes a gesture with his right hand, bringing his thumb and fingers together. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his gaze slightly, moving from looking forward to looking toward his right. The camera remains stationary, focusing on his head and upper torso as he continues to speak into the microphone.
